pull_policy.expected_next_data_note: Expect the next synced dataset on the next 30-minute pull. BTC5 maker is the only active trading sleeve.
manual_pull_triggers: Immediately after any deploy or service restart.
After any remote incident, kill event, or unexpected runtime stop.
Before writing any daily, investor, or operator summary.

velocity_forecast.definition: Operator forecast for annualized return run-rate on currently tracked capital; not realized performance.
velocity_forecast.basis: BTC5 sleeve historically profitable (+$131.52 closed, 75W/53L, 1.49 PF). Currently zero-filling due to guardrail/env issue. Once fills resume at $10/trade, run-rate should materialize quickly.
assumptions: BTC5 fill issue is an env/guardrail config problem, not a market structure change.
Scaling to $10/trade doubles revenue per fill without degrading edge.
Autoresearch timer keeps guardrails tuned to current volatility.
invalidators: If BTC5 fills do not resume after VPS diagnosis, the edge may have decayed.
If $10/trade fills show worse win rate than $5/trade, scale-up is premature.
If BTC volatility regime shifts (e.g., sustained low vol), the 5-min maker edge compresses.

active_sleeves: btc-5min-maker (running, zero fills currently — diagnosis needed)
killed_lanes: A-6 structural alpha: killed 2026-03-13, zero constructions after 5-day watch
B-1 structural alpha: killed 2026-03-13, zero template pairs after 5-day watch
blockers: BTC5 zero-fill state needs VPS diagnosis and env fix.
exit_criteria: BTC5 fills resume at $10/trade with positive net P&L.
Autoresearch timer running and self-tuning guardrails.
Runtime truth artifacts fresh (< 1 hour old).
